name: PowerMiles

rewards.displayRate: 9 Reward Points / Rs 100 spent (3X on international)

domestic: 2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per calendar quarter (8 per year) at 40+ lounges.
international: 1 complimentary international airport lounge visit per calendar quarter (4 per year) at 1000+ lounges worldwide.

exclusions: Fuel transactions (surcharge waiver only, no reward points)
additionalBenefits: Complimentary Club Marriott membership (up to 25% off on F&B, Hotel and Spa; complimentary membership for spouse)
Complimentary EazyDiner Prime membership (25-50% savings, 2,000 welcome EazyPoints, and 2X EazyPoints on every meal)
24x7 global personal concierge services for travel, entertainment, and business
Air accident cover of Rs 1 crore when flight tickets are booked with the PowerMiles card
Zero lost card liability after reporting theft or fraud
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible transactions
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period
additionalDetails: Xchange Brands redemption is available at a 1:1 rate for Apple iMagine, Tanishq, Taj, M&S, and The Body Shop.
The live public page says points can be converted to leading airline miles, but it does not publish the current partner list or transfer ratios.

salaried: Subject to Equitas Small Finance Bank credit approval
selfEmployed: Subject to Equitas Small Finance Bank credit approval

internalNotes: Card details audited against the live official Equitas PowerMiles Credit Card page on 2026-06-15.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
Annual fee waiver: Rs 4,80,000 spend in anniversary year.
Forex markup: 2% on all foreign currency transactions (lower than Tiga and Selfe at 3.5%).
The live page explicitly shows a base earn rate of 3 RP per Rs 100 and 3X rewards on international spends, so the international row is modeled as 9 RP per Rs 100.
The live page explicitly shows 1 RP = Rs 0.50 on Xchange redemption and 1:1 Xchange Brands redemption for Apple iMagine, Tanishq, Taj, M&S, and The Body Shop.
Lounge: 2 domestic per quarter (40+ lounges), 1 international per quarter (1000+ lounges).
Finance charges: 3.75% per month. Cash advance fee: 2.5% or Rs 250 whichever is higher.

The live public page says reward points can be converted to airline miles, but it does not disclose the current partner list or transfer ratios; those fields are left blank until an official public source is available.
